feed.title: Alternun - Regenerative Impact Platform
feed.description: Track, verify, and monetize your environmental and social impact with Alternun. Join the regenerative economy.

entry.title: Introducing AIRS: The Impact Rating System
entry.summary: Discover how AIRS (Alternun Impact Rating System) converts environmental and social actions into quantifiable tokens, enabling verified impact tracking and monetization.

entry.title: Getting Started with Alternun: Your First Impact Token
entry.summary: A step-by-step guide to creating your Alternun account, connecting data sources, and earning your first AIRS tokens through verified impact.

entry.title: Enterprise ESG: How Companies Are Using Alternun
entry.summary: Real-world examples of how enterprises use Alternun to monitor supply chain sustainability and meet ESG commitments with audit-ready reporting.

entry.title: The Future of Impact Investing with Blockchain Verification
entry.summary: Explore how blockchain technology ensures immutable, transparent records of verified environmental and social impact, creating trust in impact investing.
